docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT STEVEN SCHER. CHALLENGE TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
PLTF'S FILING OF REBUTTAL OF CHANGE OF VENUE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SCHLOSSMAN, ALLEN DBA ALLEN CRAIG COMMUNICAT/DESIG AS TO DEFENDANT SCHER, STEVEN  EQUIPMENT F/TECHNOLOG/& SCIENCE COR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-11-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-08-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS DENIED. CASE SET FOR TRIAL.
